notes: Runtime player sheet is assets/characters/player.png at 4096x512 with 8 frames of 512x512.
Runtime enemy sheets are goblin-basic-sheet.png, goblin-shield-sheet.png, goblin-runner-sheet.png, and orc-brute-sheet.png at 1024x256 with 4 frames of 256x256.
Gameplay sprites were edge-cleaned to remove detached alpha fragments; player/enemy sheets now target one alpha component per frame.
collectible.png was rebuilt as a single clean potion pickup component; sparkle/noise detail should live in FX assets, not the pickup silhouette.
The runtime canvas now uses DPR-aware physical sizing while preserving the 390x844 logical coordinate system.
The prompt lists below are generation history and may include earlier requested sizes.

styleGuide.bible: ART STYLE (mandatory, identical for every asset): 3D-rendered glossy mobile cartoon, 2.5D, in the polished casual-mobile style of Subway Surfers / Candy Crush. Thick clean dark outline, soft cel-shading, smooth clean gradients, glossy specular highlights, gentle ambient occlusion, rounded volumetric forms, vibrant but harmonious colors. STRICTLY NOT painterly, NOT oil-painting, NOT watercolor, NOT realistic, NOT anime/gacha splash art, NOT concept art. NO busy high-frequency texture, NO gritty grain, NO fine filigree noise, NO sketchy linework. Keep shapes simple, clean and readable.
styleGuide.outline: clean bold silhouettes, high readability at small size
styleGuide.lighting: soft top light, glossy specular highlight, gentle ambient occlusion
styleGuide.camera: clean 2.5D game render, portrait, gameplay reads in the bottom 60%
styleGuide.characterStyle: CHARACTER MUST BE A CHIBI GAME MASCOT: about 2 to 2.5 heads tall, oversized friendly head, small rounded body, big cute expressive eyes, an extremely simple bold silhouette that still reads clearly when shrunk to 64px. Standing/idle front-facing 3/4 view, cheerful and appealing. ABSOLUTELY NOT a realistic 6-8 heads-tall adult, NOT a detailed armored warrior, NOT a side-profile action pose, NOT heavy ornamentation.

backgrounds.prompt: ART STYLE (mandatory, identical for every asset): 3D-rendered glossy mobile cartoon, 2.5D, in the polished casual-mobile style of Subway Surfers / Candy Crush. Thick clean dark outline, soft cel-shading, smooth clean gradients, glossy specular highlights, gentle ambient occlusion, rounded volumetric forms, vibrant but harmonious colors. STRICTLY NOT painterly, NOT oil-painting, NOT watercolor, NOT realistic, NOT anime/gacha splash art, NOT concept art. NO busy high-frequency texture, NO gritty grain, NO fine filigree noise, NO sketchy linework. Keep shapes simple, clean and readable. BACKGROUND look: bright, airy and deliberately LOW-CONTRAST with soft simple depth; keep detail smooth and de-emphasized so foreground gameplay objects pop; large calm readable empty area through the center. Vertical PORTRAIT mobile game background, theme "Castle Meadow Dawn" for Castle Archer: a bright sunny fantasy kingdom seen from the castle wall: rolling green meadows and a winding dirt path leading from the top of the frame down toward the castle, distant blue mountains and a storybook castle town, fluffy clouds. IMPORTANT: a clean STONE CASTLE BATTLEMENT PARAPET STRIP runs along the very BOTTOM edge of the frame (the archer stands on it), simple crenellated stone blocks, occupying only the bottom 8-12% of the image. Render at 1080x1920 portrait resolution OR LARGER (2K portrait preferred) — hard minimum; never output below 1080x1920. Layered but SMOOTH parallax depth, no characters, no text, no UI, no border.

sprites.prompt: ART STYLE (mandatory, identical for every asset): 3D-rendered glossy mobile cartoon, 2.5D, in the polished casual-mobile style of Subway Surfers / Candy Crush. Thick clean dark outline, soft cel-shading, smooth clean gradients, glossy specular highlights, gentle ambient occlusion, rounded volumetric forms, vibrant but harmonious colors. STRICTLY NOT painterly, NOT oil-painting, NOT watercolor, NOT realistic, NOT anime/gacha splash art, NOT concept art. NO busy high-frequency texture, NO gritty grain, NO fine filigree noise, NO sketchy linework. Keep shapes simple, clean and readable. CHARACTER MUST BE A CHIBI GAME MASCOT: about 2 to 2.5 heads tall, oversized friendly head, small rounded body, big cute expressive eyes, an extremely simple bold silhouette that still reads clearly when shrunk to 64px. Standing/idle front-facing 3/4 view, cheerful and appealing. ABSOLUTELY NOT a realistic 6-8 heads-tall adult, NOT a detailed armored warrior, NOT a side-profile action pose, NOT heavy ornamentation. A HORIZONTAL SPRITE SHEET at maximum resolution (wide, at least 2048px total): exactly 4 equal-width cells in ONE row, each cell the SAME chibi ROYAL ARCHER mascot for Castle Archer — cheerful boy archer in blue-and-gold royal tunic with a small quiver, holding a wooden recurve bow, front-facing 3/4 view — in a slightly different ARCHERY SHOOTING pose per cell (frame1 relaxed idle holding bow, frame2 nocking an arrow, frame3 full draw aiming slightly upward, frame4 just-released follow-through). CRITICAL: identical character design, identical colors, identical scale and vertical position in every cell; cells evenly spaced; character centered within each cell. Place the subject on a FLAT SOLID PURE MAGENTA #FF00FF background that fills the entire frame right up to the crisp subject edge. Hard clean edge. NO outer glow, NO drop shadow, NO soft/feathered edge, NO colored fringe, NO haze around the subject.

ui.prompt: A single WIDE horizontal pill-shaped mobile game button, vibrant green with a smooth gradient and a bright glossy top highlight, HARD CRISP edges. The button is very wide (roughly 3:1) and fills the whole frame edge to edge. NO text, NO icon, NO outer glow, NO drop shadow, NO blur — the area outside the pill must be flat solid pure magenta right up to the crisp button edge.

A circular glossy green mobile game pause button showing two rounded white vertical bars (pause symbol), glossy top highlight, HARD CRISP circular edge, NO outer glow, NO drop shadow — flat solid pure magenta right up to the circle edge, centered and filling the frame.
